name: Vestra
description: Autonomous savings + credit agent on Celo. Users save a small fixed amount daily into a non-custodial vault — the agent never holds principal. Every on-time contribution writes to the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry, building a portable onchain credit identity. Consistent savers unlock savings-collateralized micro-advances. Built for the 15M+ MiniPay users across emerging markets who already practice daily savings but have no credit history.
